description_long: This perfume bottle features a vertically ribbed, rectangular ceramic body with softly rounded shoulders and a flat base. The bottle is predominantly a creamy off-white color, with a subtle sheen that suggests a glazed ceramic finish. On one face, there is an oval metallic-looking label with embossed text, adding a touch of vintage elegance. The cap is round, slightly domed, and decorated with raised floral or ornamental patterns, matching the bottle's color and material. The overall design is classic and refined, with a harmonious blend of smooth and textured surfaces. The bottle appears solid and weighty, suitable for display on a vanity or shelf.
description: A rectangular, ribbed ceramic perfume bottle with a domed, ornamented cap and an embossed oval label, finished in creamy off-white glaze.
description_view_0: Front view shows the ribbed ceramic body, domed cap with floral patterns, and an oval metallic label with embossed text.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the ribbed texture and the cap's decorative top, with no visible label.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the ribbed ceramic surface and cap, with no label or text visible.
description_view_3: Angled view reveals both the ribbed body and the oval label, emphasizing the bottle's symmetry and decorative cap.
attribute_brand_logo: An oval metallic-looking label on the front face, embossed with text, but no clear brand logo or symbol is visible.
attribute_bottle_cap_design: The cap is round, slightly domed, and made of the same off-white ceramic as the bottle. It features raised floral or ornamental patterns and appears to be removable.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: Rectangular with softly rounded shoulders and a flat base, topped with a circular domed cap; overall silhouette is vertically elongated and symmetrical.
attribute_decorative_elements: Vertical ribbing on the bottle body
Raised floral or ornamental patterns on the cap
Embossed oval metallic label on the front
